nasb.text: Then the man Elkanah went up with all his household to offer to the Lord the yearly sacrifice and pay his vow.

esv.text: The man Elkanah and all his house went up to offer to the Lord the yearly sacrifice and to pay his vow.

cnv.text: 以利加拿和他全家都上示羅去，向耶和華獻年祭和還所許的願；

ccb.text: 第二年，以利加拿带全家人前往示罗，向耶和华献年祭并还所许的愿。
